Alpa and J'olhmyn are formulating a plan, but what could it be?
※The difficulty of this quest will be synced to your current level.

Alpa and J'olhmyn are formulating a plan, but what could it be?
※The difficulty of this quest will be synced to your current level.

1:
Castellum Velodyna has undergone a dramatic transformation due to Alpa's ingenuity and ability to inspire others─although she would be the first to admit that none of this would have been possible without the loyal comrades at her side. In order to express her gratitude, she plans to hold a feast for a handful of her most steadfast supporters. After placing Gales in charge of procuring food and drink, she tasks you with delivering invitations to M'zhet Tia and Tahla Molkoh.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level. Furthermore, you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted this quest.
